content.en:
"Demon seed, only one!"

Ye Tian shuttled over in an instant.

This demon seed, judging from the breath, should be a demon seed at the peak of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and its strength should be very good.

However, when he met Ye Tian, he was unlucky.

That demon seed also discovered Ye Tian at this time, but it was not afraid.

After all, Ye Tian's cultivation was the same as his, so he was naturally not afraid, so he killed Ye Tian as well.

However, as soon as they fought, the demon seed instantly lost consciousness.

......

"Die!"

Ye Tian pinched it casually, and directly pinched the body of this demon seed, killing ~ it in seconds.

Such a mid-level demon seed is too weak for him-.

After killing this demon seed, Ye Tian collected the treasures on his body, and then continued to look for resources.

The resources here are too abundant, and Ye Tian is completely immersed in the search for resources.

However, here, the chance of encountering demon seeds is not too high, after all, this place is very large, and there are only so many demon seeds, and weak demon seeds will not enter here.

Just like the middle-level realm gods of the top forces, there are so many realm gods, and there are not many of them.

But.

Many of the resources here are marked, and once they are bred, there will be gods or demons to snatch them, so in the case of obtaining resources, you will often encounter demons or other gods.

And Ye Tian's strength is too strong, so when those demon seeds meet him, they are all killed by him in seconds.

Therefore, as time passed, Ye Tian found more and more resources and found resources from those demon seeds.

Among them, there are many resources and treasures that help to refine the eternal Dao seed and assist in condensing the spirit of the eternal realm, and the harvest is getting bigger and bigger.

"With so many resources, it's enough to cultivate a lot of Eternal Realm God Realm mid-tier realm gods!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

Other mid-level realm gods couldn't have such a harvest as him, he had killed a lot of mid-level demon seeds, otherwise, he wouldn't have been able to obtain so many resources.

And other mid-level realm gods, even high-level realm gods, couldn't collect resources as quickly as he did.

This is Ye Tian's advantage.

At the beginning, the Demon Seed Abyss didn't realize the seriousness of the problem, but the middle-level Demon Seeds fell one by one, and they couldn't even spread the news, after all, they were all killed by Ye Tian in seconds, how could they have time to pass on the news.

But now, many middle-level demon species can't be contacted, and they are sure to fall, and the frequency of this fall is far greater than in the past.

Therefore, they believed that there was a high-level realm god hunting the mid-level demon seed, and it was most likely a high-level realm god who had condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits, or even a high-level Realm God who had condensed nine Eternal Realm Spirits.

Even if the strength of such a high-level realm god is suppressed, it is still much stronger than the middle-level demon seed, and it is very easy to kill the middle-level demon seed.

So.

Some high-level demon seeds were dispatched, ready to kill Ye Tian.

And the mid-level demon seeds also act with the specifications of more than ten demon seeds, looking for resources and killing the gods of the world.

And so.

The other realm gods were miserable, and they were caught off guard for a while, and they lost a lot of realm gods.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered another team of demon seeds, a total of eleven mid-level demon seeds, all of whom were very strong.

After Ye Tian appeared, he immediately struck out and killed these eleven middle-level demon seeds in an instant.

"It seems that these demon seeds also realize that something is wrong, and they suspect that there are high-level realm gods hunting them, so they let the middle-level demon seeds hold together. It's a pity that I'm not a high-level realm god, but I'm even more terrifying than a high-level realm god!"

Ye Tian smiled secretly.

He collected the treasure resources on these demon seeds, and then left here.

In the following days, Ye Tian harvested resources while hunting demon seeds, and gained a lot, and there was no risk.

Gradually.

The resources he has access to are already enormous.

Shortly thereafter.

......

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian came back and put some resources that would help the gods of the human race realm to improve the eternal Dao species in the Terran Temple, and let those Terrans use the contribution points to exchange, and the price was set very low.

Of course.

More resources, he still gave to his wife, children. []

Among the many resources he had obtained this time was the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, which was enough to raise his wife and children to the limit of their Eternal Dao Species.

Other than that.

He also gave his wife and children a variety of treasures that could help condense the spirits of the Eternal Realm, which could increase the success rate.

In this way, they will condense the sixth Perfect Realm Spirit in the future, and the success rate will also be very high, and they may be able to break through successfully at one time.

It would be great if it was a one-time breakthrough.

Of course.

Even if the breakthrough fails, there is nothing to do, among the resources he obtained this time, there are also resources that can restore the Eternal Dao Species, even if the Eternal Dao Seed damage caused by the failure of the breakthrough can be recovered within a certain number of years.

Therefore, the harvest this time is enough to make the Terrans take off quickly.

Of course.

When exchanging resources from the Terran Temple, you need to make an oath that you must not leak out, you cannot publicize it, and after breaking through, you must also keep a low profile.

Ye Tian didn't want to be aware of the fact that he had obtained a large number of treasures by himself, and it was known to the dozen or so top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm, otherwise anyone would definitely have some ideas if they knew that he had obtained a large number of treasures in the Boundary Seam Realm.

After all, many top forces are still not too eager for another top force to appear in the Eastern Ukraine Realm!

This time, although they let the powerful forces enter the realm of the rift, they did not think that these powerful forces could rise.

After all, they were suppressed in the process of fighting with the demon seeds, and they were at a disadvantage, and the mid-level realm gods fell one by one, and it would be good if they didn't fall.

Like Ye Tian's side, it is simply too abnormal to frantically collect resources.

......

The boundary of the East Black Boundary.

Ye Tian naturally came in again, and this time he entered, just to let the other realm gods see it.

After all, he had other replica bodies in the realm of the Eastern Wu Realm, and he didn't need to enter it again at all, it was just pretending.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a high-level demon seed, and the other party discovered Ye Tian and prepared to kill Ye Tian with his hands.

But after the fight, the other party's face changed.

"You...... How is that possible!"

This high-level demon seed is only comparable to the high-level realm god who condenses the seven eternal realm spirits, and most of his strength has been suppressed here, where is Ye Tian's opponent!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian penetrated the opponent's body with one shot, killed him in seconds, and then took away the resources and treasures on the opponent's body, and quickly left for a long time.
